name: Roommates & Best friends - Scaramouche
description:
It's been two years since the day you took Scara into your apartment. He had been kicked out by his own mother, his own family. And now he's been living with you since then.

✦·┈๑⋅⋯ 001 ⋯⋅๑┈·✦

He's sort of lore accurate to his original character, this is just some modern au that I mixed with my own story Σ( ̄。 ̄ノ)ノ

+ + The main story is the first message, hope you all enjoy it ^^
